name: Seoul Station
short_description: This game is a “Find the Difference” game set in the Korean subway system. At the start, you will board the normal 0th train. Once you move to the 1st train, the real adventure begins. From the 1st train onward, you need to find differences from the 0th train.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the Subway Anomaly Exploration Game!

This game is a “Find the Difference” game set in the Korean subway system.

At the start, you will board the normal 0th train. Once you move to the 1st train, the real adventure begins. From the 1st train onward, you need to find differences from the 0th train.

Differences may include changes in the subway’s structure, internal advertisements, or even variations in your character’s movements. Various anomalies, ranging from subtle to significant, are ready to challenge you.

Your goals in the game are

  • Detect Anomalies: Find differences in each train and identify the trains with anomalies.
  • Return: If you detect an anomaly, immediately go back to the previous train.
  • Advance: Move to the next train if no anomalies are found.
  • Achieve the Goal: If you fail to detect an anomaly and move to the next train, you will return to the 1st train. Successfully detecting anomalies will increase the train number one by one until you reach the 10th train.

Play Time

Approximately 10-60 minutes

Options

3 graphic options available

Are you ready to solve the mysteries of the subway and escape the endlessly repeating trains? Find out what the anomalies are and take on the challenge!
